synopsis: [El-errata] ELSA-2026-0523 Moderate: Oracle Linux 8 postgresql:13 security update
description:
pgaudit
pg_repack

full_text:
Oracle Linux Security Advisory ELSA-2026-0523

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2026-0523.html
